name: secretnote

metadata.name: secretnote
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License

documentation:
# SecretNote

This is the backend of the notebook suite named [SecretNote](https://github.com/secretflow/secretnote). It serves both Jupyter Server, SecretNote specified APIs and static files of the playground, for both SecretFlow in Python and the SCQL.

## Installation

We recommend you to install in a clean Python 3.10 environment. You can use your favorite virtual environment solution.

### From PyPI

```sh
conda create -n secretnote python=3.10 # use conda for example
conda activate secretnote
pip install secretnote
```

### From Source

```sh
pnpm bootstrap # pnpm and rye are required
```

## Start Locally

Start SecretNote SF for SecretFlow Python programming

```bash
secretnote sf . --config=/somewhere/config.py
```

Start SecretNote SCQL for SCQL programming

```sh
secretnote scql . --config=/somewhere/config.py
```

Common Jupyter Command Line Options are supported. For example, to change the port, use

```bash
secretnote sf . --ServerApp.port 8889
```

functions.name: secretnote.scql.server.utils.request
documentation: Send a async JSON request to a given url. The response is also parsed as JSON.

documentation: Serves the static files of the SecretNote frontend as a single-page application.

documentation:
Serve static content, emulating a typical single-page application.
It tries to match path against a static file. If it exists, serve it
Otherwise, serve the index.html file, which will load the application
and handle the routing.

modules.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager
documentation: This is the manager that interacts with SCQL's broker, just like "broker's broker".
SCQL itself exposes a set of APIs to manage projects, tables, and column control lists (CCLs).
@see https://www.secretflow.org.cn/zh-CN/docs/scql/0.9.0b1/reference/broker-api
APIs here are consistent with those of SCQL's broker.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.__init__
documentation: Initialize the broker manager as `party` to interact with endpoint `broker`.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.validate_response
documentation: Check if the response is valid. Returns the response.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.create_project
documentation:
Create a new Project and automatically become the Project member and creator.
Returns the project_id.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.list_projects
documentation: List All Projects that have created and joined.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.list_invitations
documentation:
List all invitations sent and received. Filtered according to `party`
by `roles` in ["inviter", "invitee"].

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.process_invitation
documentation:
Process the received invitation, specify it by invitation_id,
choose to join the corresponding project or reject it.
Returns the invitation_id.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.invite_member
documentation: Invite another member to join the Project you created

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.list_tables
documentation: List all Tables in specified Project.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.create_table
documentation: Create a Table you owned in specified Project.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.drop_table
documentation: Drop a Table you owned in specified Project, the relevant CCLs will be automatically cleared.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.show_ccl
documentation: Show CCLs in specified Project, supports specifying Tables, members.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.grant_ccl
documentation: Grant a list of column control lists to a project.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.revoke_ccl
documentation: Revoke the CCLs you have granted to the specified member.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.do_query
documentation: Do a query and return the result.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.submit_query
documentation: Run Query asynchronously. Returns the job_id.

methods.name: secretnote.scql.server.services.broker_manager.BrokerManager.fetch_result
documentation: Fetch query result of asynchronous query. Returns the out_columns.
